dependence.value: m&Detail;$000000, d&Detail;$000000, r&Tax;$000000, i&Detail;$000000, c&Detail;$000000, ctgt30
dependence.alias: m, d, t, i, g, c

alias.value: master, detail, tax, inquiry, general, inputTax

processing.text: &CheckVoucherRightBeforeProcess; declare @q nvarchar(4000), @duplicate nvarchar(512), @e1 nvarchar(512), @e2 nvarchar(512), @e3 nvarchar(512), @locked nvarchar(512), @field varchar(32), @wsID varchar(8), @voucherID varchar(8) declare @master varchar(16), @detail varchar(16), @inquiry varchar(16), @general varchar(16), @baseCurrency varchar(8), @datetime0 char(21), @d0 datetime declare @tax varchar(16), @taxProperty varchar(3), @voucherTemplate varchar(32), @checkInputVAT bit, @inputVATDuplicate nvarchar(512), @inputVATExists nvarchar(512) declare @user int, @admin bit, @r int, @m int, @y int, @max1 int, @max2 int, @currentID int, @count int, @roundAmount int, @roundFAmount int declare @taxVerify varchar(32), @inputVATVerify nvarchar(512) select @d0 = getdate(), @datetime0 = convert(char(8), @d0, 112) + ' ' + convert(char(12), @d0, 114), @status = left(replace(@status, '''', '') , 1) select @admin = @@admin, @user = @@userID, @master = 'm&Detail;$', @detail = 'd&Detail;$', @inquiry = 'i&Detail;$', @general = 'c&Detail;$000000', @voucherID = '&Code;', @tax = 'r&Tax;$' select @locked = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Đã khóa số liệu, kiểm tra lại ngày chứng từ tại dòng %s.' else N'Data is locked, please check the date of voucher at row %s.' end select @duplicate = case when @@language = 'v' then N'&s1; đã tồn tại.' else '&s2; already exists.' end select @inputVATExists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'&s3; đã được cập nhật trong phần thuế đầu vào.' else '&s4; already exists in Input VAT data.' end select @inputVATDuplicate = case when @@language = 'v' then N'&s3; trùng nhau trong chi tiết thuế đầu vào.' else '&s4; already exists in Input VAT data.' end select @inputVATVerify = case when @@language = 'v' then N'&s3;, thông tin thuế trên bảng kê khác với thông tin thuế ghi sổ trong chi tiết của tài khoản %s3.' else '&s4;, tax data in VAT invoice listing is different from one in tax account ledger (account = %s3).' end select @e1 = case when @@language = 'v' then N'&s1; chưa nhập đủ tài khoản nợ hoặc có trong nhóm định khoản.' else '&s2; has not been entered all debit or credit entries in the records (group).' end select @e2 = case when @@language = 'v' then N'&s1; có hạch toán nhiều nợ, nhiều có trong nhóm định khoản.' else 'There are multi debit credit entries in the records (group) in &s2;.' end select @e3 = case when @@language = 'v' then N'&s1; có phát sinh nợ và phát sinh có khác nhau trong nhóm định khoản.' else '&s2; has difference between total debit and total credit in group.' end select @wsID = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ws_id' select @baseCurrency = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ma_nt0' select @roundAmount = cast(rtrim(val) as int) from options where name = 'm_round_tien' select @roundFAmount = cast(rtrim(val) as int) from options where name = 'm_round_tien_nt' select @taxVerify = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ktthue_pkt' select @taxProperty = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ma_tc_thue' select @voucherTemplate = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_mau_ct_dv' if not exists(select 1 from dmmauct where ma_mau_ct = @voucherTemplate) select @voucherTemplate = '' if exists(select 1 from options where name = 'm_kthd_tdv' and val = '1') select @checkInputVAT = 1 else select @checkInputVAT = 0 select @max1 = character_maximum_length from information_schema.columns where table_name = @master + '000000' and column_name = 'so_ct' select @max2 = character_maximum_length from information_schema.columns where table_name = @detail + '000000' and column_name = 'so_lsx' -- Checking update @@table set so_ct = space(@max1 - len(rtrim(ltrim(so_ct)))) + rtrim(ltrim(so_ct)) if @check$Unit <> '1' select @r = min(stt) from @@table a join c&Detail;$000000 b on a.ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = b.so_ct else select @r = min(stt) from @@table a join c&Detail;$000000 b on a.ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = b.so_ct and a.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs if @r is not null begin if @check$Unit <> '1' select replace(replace(replace(@duplicate, '%s1', so_ct), '%s2', convert(varchar(12), cast(ngay_ct as smalldatetime), 103)), '%s3', @@delta + @r) as message from @@table where stt = @r else select replace(replace(replace(replace(@duplicate$Unit, '%s1', so_ct), '%s2', convert(varchar(12), cast(ngay_ct as smalldatetime), 103)), '%s3', rtrim(ma_dvcs)), '%s4', @@delta + @r) as message from @@table where stt = @r return end -- Update update @@table set so_lsx = space(@max2 - len(ltrim(rtrim(so_lsx)))) + ltrim(rtrim(so_lsx)), ma_nt = case when ma_nt <> '' then ma_nt else @baseCurrency end select top 0 ma_dvcs, ngay_ct, so_ct into #unit from m&Detail;$000000 insert into #unit select ma_dvcs, ngay_ct, so_ct from @@table group by ma_dvcs, ngay_ct, so_ct -- Locked Date select @r = min(stt) from @@table a, dmstt b where (a.ngay_ct < b.ngay_gh1) or (a.ngay_ct > b.ngay_gh2) or (a.ngay_ct <= b.ngay_ks)&LockedDate; select @r = min(stt) from @@table a, dmctks b where b.user_id = @user and b.ma_ct = @voucherID and a.ngay_ct <= b.ngay_ks&LockedDate; select @r = min(stt) from @@table a, dmdvcsks b, #unit c where a.ngay_ct = c.ngay_ct and b.ma_dvcs = c.ma_dvcs and a.ngay_ct <= b.ngay_ks&LockedDate; select @r = min(stt) from @@table a, dmct2ks b where b.ma_ct = @voucherID and a.ngay_ct <= b.ngay_ks&LockedDate; select @r = min(stt) from @@table a, sysdaterules b where b.user_id = @user and ((b.ngay_ct1 is not null and a.ngay_ct < b.ngay_ct1) or (b.ngay_ct2 is not null and a.ngay_ct > b.ngay_ct2))&LockedDate; -- Check code select @field = 'ma_dvcs', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_dvcs not in (select ma_dvcs from dmdvcs)&Error; select @field = 'tk', @r = min(stt) from @@table where tk not in (select tk from dmtk where loai_tk = 1)&Error; select @field = 'ma_kh', @r = min(stt) from @@table a where ma_kh = '' and exists(select 1 from dmtk b where a.tk = b.tk and b.tk_cn = 1)&Error; select @field = 'ma_kh', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_kh <> '' and ma_kh not in (select ma_kh from dmkh)&Error; select @field = 'ma_nk', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_nk <> '' and ma_nk not in (select ma_nk from v20dmnk)&Error; select @field = 'ma_vv', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_vv <> '' and ma_vv not in (select ma_vv from dmvv)&Error; select @field = 'ma_bp', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_bp <> '' and ma_bp not in (select ma_bp from dmbp)&Error; select @field = 'so_lsx', @r = min(stt) from @@table where so_lsx <> '' and so_lsx not in (select so_lsx from phlsx)&Error; select @field = 'ma_sp', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_sp <> '' and ma_sp not in (select ma_vt from vdmsp)&Error; select @field = 'ma_hd', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_hd <> '' and ma_hd not in (select ma_hd from dmhd)&Error; select @field = 'ma_phi', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_phi <> '' and ma_phi not in (select ma_phi from dmphi)&Error; select @field = 'ma_ku', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_ku <> '' and ma_ku not in (select ma_ku from dmku)&Error; -- Check Group select top 0 a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.nh_dk, a.ps_no_nt, a.ps_co_nt, cast(0 as int) as no, cast(0 as int) as co, cast(0 as int) as nc_yn into #group from d&Detail;$000000 a insert into #group select ngay_ct, so_ct, nh_dk, sum(ps_no_nt), sum(ps_co_nt), sum(case when ps_no_nt = 0 then 0 else 1 end), sum(case when ps_co_nt = 0 then 0 else 1 end), sum(case when ps_no_nt <> 0 and ps_co_nt <> 0 then 1 else 0 end) from @@table group by ngay_ct, so_ct, nh_dk create index i on #group (ngay_ct, so_ct, nh_dk) select @r = min(stt) from @@table a join #group b on a.ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = b.so_ct and a.nh_dk = b.nh_dk where (b.no * b.co = 0) or nc_yn = 1 if @r is not null begin select replace(replace(replace(@e1, '%s1', so_ct), '%s2', convert(varchar(12), cast(ngay_ct as smalldatetime), 103)), '%s3', @@delta + @r) as message from @@table where stt = @r return end select @r = min(stt) from @@table a join #group b on a.ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = b.so_ct and a.nh_dk = b.nh_dk where (b.no - 1) * (b.co - 1) <> 0 if @r is not null begin select replace(replace(replace(@e2, '%s1', so_ct), '%s2', convert(varchar(12), cast(ngay_ct as smalldatetime), 103)), '%s3', @@delta + @r) as message from @@table where stt = @r return end select @r = min(stt) from @@table a join #group b on a.ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = b.so_ct and a.nh_dk = b.nh_dk where (b.ps_no_nt <> b.ps_co_nt) if @r is not null begin select replace(replace(replace(@e3, '%s1', so_ct), '%s2', convert(varchar(12), cast(ngay_ct as smalldatetime), 103)), '%s3', @@delta + @r) as message from @@table where stt = @r return end update @@table set mau_bc = case when mau_bc = '' then '3' else mau_bc end, ma_tc = case when ma_tc = '' then @taxProperty else ma_tc end, ma_mau_ct = case when ma_mau_ct = '' then @voucherTemplate else ma_mau_ct end where ma_thue <> '' update @@table set ten_kh_i = isnull(case when a.ten_kh_i <> '' then a.ten_kh_i else b.ten_kh end, ''), dia_chi_i = isnull(case when a.dia_chi_i <> '' then a.dia_chi_i else b.dia_chi end, ''), ma_so_thue = isnull(case when a.ma_so_thue <> '' then a.ma_so_thue else rtrim(b.ma_so_thue) end, '') from @@table a left join dmkh b on a.ma_kh_i = b.ma_kh where a.ma_thue <> '' update @@table set tk_thue_no = case when a.tk_thue_no <> '' then a.tk_thue_no else b.tk_thue_no3 end from @@table a left join dmthue b on a.ma_thue = b.ma_thue where a.ma_thue <> '' -- Check VAT Verify if @taxVerify = '1' begin select ngay_ct, so_ct, tk, sum(ps_no_nt) as ps_no_nt into #detailVAT from @@table group by ngay_ct, so_ct, tk create index i1 on #detailVAT (ngay_ct, so_ct) select ngay_ct, so_ct, tk_thue_no, sum(t_thue_nt) as t_thue_nt into #groupVAT from @@table where ma_thue <> '' group by ngay_ct, so_ct, tk_thue_no create index i2 on #groupVAT (ngay_ct, so_ct) select a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct into #groupVATVerify from #groupVAT a join #detailVAT b on a.ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = b.so_ct and a.tk_thue_no = b.tk where a.t_thue_nt = b.ps_no_nt create index i3 on #groupVATVerify (ngay_ct, so_ct) select @r = min(a.stt) from @@table a where a.ma_thue <> '' and not exists(select 1 from #groupVATVerify b where a.ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = b.so_ct) if @r is not null begin select replace(replace(replace(@inputVATVerify, '%s1', so_ct0), '%s2', @@delta + @r), '%s3', tk_thue_no) as message from @@table where stt = @r return end end -- Check Input VAT if @checkInputVAT = 1 begin select @r = min(a.stt) from @@table a join @@table b on a.so_ct0 = b.so_ct0 and a.so_seri0 = b.so_seri0 and a.ngay_ct0 = b.ngay_ct0 and a.ma_so_thue = b.ma_so_thue where a.ngay_ct <> b.ngay_ct or a.so_ct <> b.so_ct group by a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct if @r is not null begin select replace(replace(@inputVATDuplicate, '%s1', so_ct0), '%s2', @@delta + @r) as message from @@table where stt = @r return end select @r = min(stt) from @@table a join ctgt30 b with (index(c)) on a.so_ct0 = b.so_ct0 and a.so_seri0 = b.so_seri0 and a.ngay_ct0 = b.ngay_ct0 and a.ma_so_thue = b.ma_so_thue if @r is not null begin select replace(replace(@inputVATExists, '%s1', so_ct0), '%s2', @@delta + @r) as message from @@table where stt = @r return end end -- Gather select top 0 stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct, cast(0 as int) as stt, identity(int, 1, 1) as id into #id from m&Detail;$000000 insert into #id(stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct, stt) select '', ngay_ct, so_ct, min(stt) from @@table group by ngay_ct, so_ct order by ngay_ct, so_ct select identity(int, 1, 1) as id, cast(stt as int) as stt, convert(varchar(8), ngay_ct, 112) + so_ct as c, cast(0 as int) as ln into #ln from @@table order by ngay_ct, so_ct, stt declare @lineNumber int, @keyValue varchar(64), @sequence bit select @keyValue = null update #ln set @sequence = case when c = @keyValue then 1 else 0 end, @lineNumber = case when @sequence = 1 then @lineNumber + 1 else 1 end, ln = @lineNumber, @keyValue = c from #ln with (index(0)) create index i on #ln(stt) select @count = count(*) from #id select @currentID = stt_rec from dmstt update dmstt set stt_rec = stt_rec + @count update #id set stt_rec = @wsID + replace(str(id + rtrim(@currentID) , 9), ' ', '0') + @voucherID select top 0 stt_rec, stt_rec0, line_nbr, ma_dvcs, loai_ct, ngay_lct, ngay_ct, so_ct, ngay_ct0, so_ct0, so_seri0, ma_thue, thue_suat, t_tien_nt, t_tien, t_thue_nt, t_thue, ma_tt, tk_thue_no, tk_du, mau_bc, ma_tc, ma_mau_ct, ma_kh, ten_kh, dia_chi, ma_so_thue, ma_kh2, ten_vt, ghi_chu, ma_nt, ty_gia into #r&Tax; from r&Tax;$000000 insert into #r&Tax; select b.stt_rec, dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$Voucher$GetRecordsGroup(i.ln), i.ln, c.ma_dvcs, '2', a.ngay_ct, a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.ngay_ct0, a.so_ct0, a.so_seri0, a.ma_thue, isnull(d.thue_suat, 0), a.t_tien_nt, round(a.t_tien_nt * a.ty_gia, @roundAmount), a.t_thue_nt, round(a.t_thue_nt * a.ty_gia, @roundAmount), '', a.tk_thue_no, a.tk_du, a.mau_bc, a.ma_tc, a.ma_mau_ct, a.ma_kh_i, a.ten_kh_i, a.dia_chi_i, a.ma_so_thue, a.ma_kh2, a.ten_vt, a.ghi_chu, a.ma_nt, a.ty_gia from @@table a join #id b on a.ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = b.so_ct join #unit c on a.ngay_ct = c.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = c.so_ct left join dmthue d on a.ma_thue = d.ma_thue join #ln i on a.stt = i.stt where a.ma_thue <> '' order by a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.stt select top 0 stt_rec, stt_rec0, line_nbr, ngay_ct, so_ct, tk, ma_kh, ps_no_nt, ps_no, ps_co_nt, ps_co, dien_giai, ma_vv, ma_bp, so_lsx, ma_sp, ma_hd, ma_phi, ma_ku, nh_dk into #d&Detail; from d&Detail;$000000 insert into #d&Detail; select b.stt_rec, dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$Voucher$GetRecordsGroup(i.ln), i.ln, a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.tk, a.ma_kh, a.ps_no_nt, round(a.ps_no_nt * a.ty_gia, @roundAmount), a.ps_co_nt, round(a.ps_co_nt * a.ty_gia, @roundAmount), a.dien_giai_d, a.ma_vv, a.ma_bp, a.so_lsx, a.ma_sp, a.ma_hd, a.ma_phi, a.ma_ku, a.nh_dk from @@table a join #id b on a.ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = b.so_ct join #ln i on a.stt = i.stt order by a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.stt select top 0 stt_rec, status, ma_dvcs, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_nt, ty_gia, t_ps_no_nt, t_ps_no, t_ps_co_nt, t_ps_co, dien_giai, ma_nk into #m&Detail; from m&Detail;$000000 insert into #m&Detail; select b.stt_rec, @status, c.ma_dvcs, a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.ma_nt, a.ty_gia, d.t_ps_no_nt, d.t_ps_no, d.t_ps_co_nt, d.t_ps_co, a.dien_giai, a.ma_nk from @@table a join #id b on a.stt = b.stt join #unit c on a.ngay_ct = c.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = c.so_ct join (select stt_rec, sum(ps_no_nt) as t_ps_no_nt, sum(ps_no) as t_ps_no , sum(ps_co_nt) as t_ps_co_nt, sum(ps_co) as t_ps_co from #d&Detail; group by stt_rec) d on b.stt_rec = d.stt_rec update #d&Detail; set dien_giai = b.dien_giai from #d&Detail; a join #m&Detail; b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec where isnull(a.dien_giai, '') = '' select top 0 stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_dvcs, status, user_id0, c$, m$, d$, identity(int, 1, 1) as id into #i&Detail; from i&Detail;$000000 insert into #i&Detail; select stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_dvcs, @status, @user, convert(varchar(12), ngay_ct, 112) + so_ct + stt_rec, '#10$' + rtrim(ma_nt), '' from #m&Detail; select @q = dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$Update$Inquiry('#i&Detail;', '#d&Detail;', 'd$', 'tk, ma_kh', '#10$, #20$', 'stt_rec', default, default, default, default, default) exec sp_executesql @q -- Insert declare @p varchar(32), @masterTable varchar(32), @detailTable varchar(32), @inquiryTable varchar(32), @insertKey varchar(128), @taxTable varchar(32),@masterFields varchar(8000), @detailFields varchar(8000), @TaxFields varchar(8000) select @masterFields = 'stt_rec, ma_dvcs, loai_ct, ma_ct, ngay_lct, ngay_ct, so_ct, so_lo, ngay_lo, ma_nk, ma_gd, dien_giai, ma_nt, ty_gia, t_ps_no_nt, t_ps_co_nt, t_ps_no, t_ps_co, ' select @masterFields = @masterFields + 'hd_gtgt3, hd_gtgt2, nam, ky, ong_ba, so_ct0, ngay_ct0, status, datetime0, datetime2, user_id0, user_id2, contract_id, bcontract_id, fee_id, so_dh, job_id, prd_id, dept_id, mo_nbr, ' select @masterFields = @masterFields + 'fcode1, fcode2, fcode3, fdate1, fdate2, fdate3, fqty1, fqty2, fqty3, fnote1, fnote2, fnote3, s1, s2, s3, s4, s5, s6, s7, s8, s9' select @detailFields = 'stt_rec, stt_rec0, ma_ct, ngay_ct, so_ct, dien_giai, tk, ' select @detailFields = @detailFields + 'ps_no_nt, ps_co_nt, ps_no, ps_co, ' select @detailFields = @detailFields + 'nh_dk, ma_kh, ma_vv, ma_sp, ma_bp, so_lsx, ' select @detailFields = @detailFields + 'stt_rec_tt, tien_tt_qd, ma_tt, so_ct0, ngay_ct0, line_nbr, ' select @detailFields = @detailFields + 'ma_hd, ma_ku, ma_phi, so_dh_i, ' select @detailFields = @detailFields + 'ma_td1, ma_td2, ma_td3, sl_td1, sl_td2, sl_td3, ngay_td1, ngay_td2, ngay_td3, gc_td1, gc_td2, gc_td3, s1, s2, s3, s4, s5, s6, s7, s8, s9' select distinct month(ngay_ct) as m, year(ngay_ct) as y into #k from #id select @r = min(y * 12 + m) from #k while @r is not null begin select @m = m, @y = y from #k where y * 12 + m = @r select @p = rtrim(@y) + replace(str(@m, 2), ' ', '0'), @insertKey = 'month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) select @masterTable = @master + @p, @detailTable = @detail + @p, @taxTable = @tax + @p, @inquiryTable = @inquiry + @p -- m11 select @q = 'insert into ' + @masterTable + ' select stt_rec, ma_dvcs , '''', ''' + @voucherID + ''', ngay_ct, ngay_ct, so_ct, '''', null, ma_nk, '''', dien_giai, ma_nt, ty_gia, ' select @q = @q + 't_ps_no_nt, t_ps_co_nt, t_ps_no, t_ps_co, ' select @q = @q + '0, 0, 0, 0, '''', '''', null, ''' + @status + '''' select @q = @q + ',getdate(), getdate(), ' + rtrim(@user) + ',' + rtrim(@user) + ', ' select @q = @q + ''''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', null, null, null, 0, 0, 0, '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', 0, 0, 0, null, null, null' select @q = @q + ' from #m&Detail; where month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) exec sp_executesql @q --d11 select @q = 'insert into ' + @detailTable + '(' + @detailFields + ')' + ' select stt_rec, stt_rec0, ''' + @voucherID + ''', ngay_ct, so_ct, dien_giai, tk, ' select @q = @q + 'ps_no_nt, ps_co_nt, ps_no, ps_co, ' select @q = @q + 'nh_dk, ma_kh, ma_vv, ma_sp, ma_bp, so_lsx, '''', 0, '''', '''', null, line_nbr, ma_hd, ma_ku, ma_phi, '''', ' select @q = @q + ''''', '''', '''', 0, 0, 0, null, null, null, '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', 0, 0, 0, null, null, null' select @q = @q + ' from #d&Detail; where month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) exec sp_executesql @q -- i11 select @q = 'insert into ' + @inquiryTable + ' select stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_dvcs, status, user_id0, c$, m$, d$' select @q = @q + ' from #i&Detail; where month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) exec sp_executesql @q -- c11 select @q = 'insert into ' + @general + ' select stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_dvcs, status, user_id0' select @q = @q + ' from #i&Detail; where month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) exec sp_executesql @q select @r = min(y * 12 + m) from #k where y * 12 + m > @r end declare @fieldSelect varchar(4000), @m_gl_tt char(1), @m_tk_cn_pth varchar(256), @m_tk_cn_ptr varchar(256), @External nvarchar(4000), @Statement nvarchar(4000), @Numeric varchar(4000), @String varchar(4000), @s nvarchar(4000) if @status <> '0' begin select @m_gl_tt = replace(val, '''', '') from options where name = 'm_gl_tt' select @m_tk_cn_pth = replace(val, '''', '') from options where name = 'm_tk_cn_pth' select @m_tk_cn_ptr = replace(val, '''', '') from options where name = 'm_tk_cn_ptr' -- Tax select @TaxFields = 'stt_rec, stt_rec0, ma_ct, line_nbr, ma_dvcs, loai_ct, ngay_lct, ngay_ct, so_ct, ngay_ct0, so_ct0, so_seri0, ma_thue, thue_suat, t_tien_nt, t_tien, t_thue_nt, t_thue, ma_tt,' select @TaxFields = @TaxFields + 'tk_thue_no, tk_du, mau_bc, ma_tc, ma_mau_ct, ma_kh, ten_kh, dia_chi, ma_so_thue, ma_kh2, ten_vt, ghi_chu, ma_nt, ty_gia, status' if exists(select 1 from #r&Tax;) begin select @q = 'insert into ' + @taxTable + '(' + @TaxFields + ')' + ' select stt_rec, stt_rec0, ''' + @voucherID + ''',' select @q = @q + 'line_nbr, ma_dvcs, loai_ct, ngay_lct, ngay_ct, so_ct, ngay_ct0, so_ct0, so_seri0, ma_thue, thue_suat, t_tien_nt, t_tien, t_thue_nt, t_thue, ma_tt,' select @q = @q + 'tk_thue_no, tk_du, mau_bc, ma_tc, ma_mau_ct, ma_kh, ten_kh, dia_chi, ma_so_thue, ma_kh2, ten_vt, ghi_chu, ma_nt, ty_gia, ''' + @status + '''' select @q = @q + ' from #r&Tax; where month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) exec sp_executesql @q select @q = 'insert into ctgt30 ' + '(' + @TaxFields + ')' + ' select stt_rec, stt_rec0, ''' + @voucherID + ''',' select @q = @q + 'line_nbr, ma_dvcs, loai_ct, ngay_lct, ngay_ct, so_ct, ngay_ct0, so_ct0, so_seri0, ma_thue, thue_suat, t_tien_nt, t_tien, t_thue_nt, t_thue, ma_tt,' select @q = @q + 'tk_thue_no, tk_du, mau_bc, ma_tc, ma_mau_ct, ma_kh, ten_kh, dia_chi, ma_so_thue, ma_kh2, ten_vt, ghi_chu, ma_nt, ty_gia, ''' + @status + '''' select @q = @q + ' from #r&Tax; ' exec sp_executesql @q end end if @status = '2' begin declare @glGroup varchar(128), @glAcctField varchar(128), @glAcctFieldRef varchar(128), @glAmountField varchar(128), @glFCAmountField varchar(128), @glKey varchar(512), @glNoAccList varchar(128), @glNoAccListRef varchar(128), @glGroups varchar(128) select @glAcctField = 'tk_no', @glAcctFieldRef = 'tk_co', @glAmountField = 'tien', @glFCAmountField = 'tien_nt', @glKey = '1=1', @glNoAccList = '0', @glNoAccListRef = '0', @glGroups = '1' select @Numeric = 'nam, ky, sl_td1, sl_td2, sl_td3, s4, s5, s6', @String = ' so_lo, ong_ba, ma_gd, so_dh, gc_td1, gc_td2, so_ct0, s1, s2', @External = 'dien_giai_h = b.dien_giai, datetime0 = ''' + @datetime0 + ''', datetime2 = ''' + @datetime0 + ''', user_id0 = ' + rtrim(@user) + ', user_id2 = ' + rtrim(@user) select @glGroup = 'nh_dk, ma_vv, ma_sp, ma_bp, so_lsx, ma_hd, ma_ku, ma_phi' select @Statement = 'update #gl set ma_kh = case when a.ma_kh <> '''' then a.ma_kh else b.ma_kh end, ma_vv = case when a.ma_vv <> '''' then a.ma_vv else b.ma_vv end, ma_sp = case when a.ma_sp <> '''' then a.ma_sp else b.ma_sp end, ma_bp = case when a.ma_bp <> '''' then a.ma_bp else b.ma_bp end, so_lsx = case when a.so_lsx <> '''' then a.so_lsx else b.so_lsx end, ma_hd = case when a.ma_hd <> '''' then a.ma_hd else b.ma_hd end, ma_ku = case when a.ma_ku <> '''' then a.ma_ku else b.ma_ku end, ma_phi = case when a.ma_phi <> '''' then a.ma_phi else b.ma_phi end, dien_giai = case when a.dien_giai <> '''' then a.dien_giai else b.dien_giai end from #gl b join #gl1 a on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec and a.nh_dk = b.nh_dk where b.ps_co + b.ps_co_nt <> 0' select @Statement = @Statement + char(13) + ' update #gl set ma_kh = case when a.ma_kh <> '''' then a.ma_kh else b.ma_kh end, ma_vv = case when a.ma_vv <> '''' then a.ma_vv else b.ma_vv end, ma_sp = case when a.ma_sp <> '''' then a.ma_sp else b.ma_sp end, ma_bp = case when a.ma_bp <> '''' then a.ma_bp else b.ma_bp end, so_lsx = case when a.so_lsx <> '''' then a.so_lsx else b.so_lsx end, ma_hd = case when a.ma_hd <> '''' then a.ma_hd else b.ma_hd end, ma_ku = case when a.ma_ku <> '''' then a.ma_ku else b.ma_ku end, ma_phi = case when a.ma_phi <> '''' then a.ma_phi else b.ma_phi end, dien_giai = case when a.dien_giai <> '''' then a.dien_giai else b.dien_giai end from #gl b join #gl2 a on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec and a.nh_dk = b.nh_dk where b.ps_no + b.ps_no_nt <> 0' select stt_rec, nh_dk, case when sum(case when ps_no + ps_no_nt <> 0 then 1 else 0 end) >= sum(case when ps_no + ps_no_nt <> 0 then 0 else 1 end) then 1 else 0 end as xtype into #grtype from #d&Detail; group by stt_rec, nh_dk select a.stt_rec, a.tk, a.nh_dk, a.ma_kh, a.ma_vv, a.ma_sp, a.ma_bp, a.so_lsx, a.ma_hd, a.ma_ku, a.ma_phi, a.dien_giai into #gl1 from #d&Detail; a where a.ps_co + a.ps_co_nt <> 0 and exists (select 1 from #grtype b where a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec and a.nh_dk = b.nh_dk and b.xtype = 1) select a.stt_rec, a.tk, a.nh_dk, a.ma_kh, a.ma_vv, a.ma_sp, a.ma_bp, a.so_lsx, a.ma_hd, a.ma_ku, a.ma_phi, a.dien_giai into #gl2 from #d&Detail; a where a.ps_no + a.ps_no_nt <> 0 and exists (select 1 from #grtype b where a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec and a.nh_dk = b.nh_dk and b.xtype = 0) select a.stt_rec, a.stt_rec0, a.line_nbr, a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.tk as tk_no, b.tk as tk_co, a.ps_no as tien, a.ps_no_nt as tien_nt, a.nh_dk, case when a.ma_kh <> '' then a.ma_kh else b.ma_kh end as ma_kh, case when a.ma_vv <> '' then a.ma_vv else b.ma_vv end as ma_vv, case when a.ma_sp <> '' then a.ma_sp else b.ma_sp end as ma_sp, case when a.ma_bp <> '' then a.ma_bp else b.ma_bp end as ma_bp, case when a.so_lsx <> '' then a.so_lsx else b.so_lsx end as so_lsx, case when a.ma_hd <> '' then a.ma_hd else b.ma_hd end as ma_hd, case when a.ma_ku <> '' then a.ma_ku else b.ma_ku end as ma_ku, case when a.ma_phi <> '' then a.ma_phi else b.ma_phi end as ma_phi, case when a.dien_giai <> '' then a.dien_giai else b.dien_giai end as dien_giai into #dGL0 from #d&Detail; a join #gl1 b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec and a.nh_dk = b.nh_dk where a.ps_no + a.ps_no_nt <> 0 insert into #dGL0 select a.stt_rec, a.stt_rec0, a.line_nbr, a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, b.tk, a.tk, a.ps_co, a.ps_co_nt, a.nh_dk, case when a.ma_kh <> '' then a.ma_kh else b.ma_kh end as ma_kh, case when a.ma_vv <> '' then a.ma_vv else b.ma_vv end as ma_vv, case when a.ma_sp <> '' then a.ma_sp else b.ma_sp end as ma_sp, case when a.ma_bp <> '' then a.ma_bp else b.ma_bp end as ma_bp, case when a.so_lsx <> '' then a.so_lsx else b.so_lsx end as so_lsx, case when a.ma_hd <> '' then a.ma_hd else b.ma_hd end as ma_hd, case when a.ma_ku <> '' then a.ma_ku else b.ma_ku end as ma_ku, case when a.ma_phi <> '' then a.ma_phi else b.ma_phi end as ma_phi, case when a.dien_giai <> '' then a.dien_giai else b.dien_giai end as dien_giai from #d&Detail; a join #gl2 b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec and a.nh_dk = b.nh_dk where a.ps_co + a.ps_co_nt <> 0 select a.*, b.ma_dvcs, a.ma_kh as ma_kh_ref, @voucherID as ma_ct, cast('' as char(2)) as loai_ct, b.ngay_ct as ngay_lct, b.ma_nt,b.ty_gia, a.dien_giai as dien_giai_h, b.ma_nk into #dGL from #dGL0 a join #m&Detail; b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec exec MaxvOnline$Voucher$Import$PostGL2 '#m&Detail;', '#dGL', @voucherID, @glAcctField, @glAcctFieldRef, @glAmountField, @glFCAmountField, @glKey, @glNoAccList, @glNoAccListRef, @glGroup, @Numeric, @String, @External, @Statement, '#k', @glGroups end --end
